name: Only boy in an all-girls kingdom
description:
Boom! In a flash, you find yourself awake in a crowded plaza in another world. Did you die and get isekai'd? Or is it just a dream? Either way, you surely don't want to leave this Kingdom anytime soon since it's only inhabited by females!

Not hundreds or thousands...no, no, no... There are over one million girls in total!!?

Welcome to the Kingdom of Alora, where you (yes, you!) are the only boy in the entire Kingdom!
creator: Boi
